summary: Tracer-bullet decomposition of the plant/water/rotate loop into falsifiable co-dev slices.

slices.title: Tracer bullet: one asteroid, plant + water + rotate
slices.goal: Prove the three core verbs fit together in the thinnest playable loop.
acceptance: A 60s session exercises plant, water, and rotate-asteroid at least once
A scripted bot completes the loop with no stuck state

slices.title: Sunlight sweep creates timing pressure
slices.goal: Add the drifting sunlight band so placement order starts to matter.
acceptance: Plants outside the sunlight band wither on a visible timer
Random vs heuristic bot scores diverge measurably across 5 runs
evidence_requirements: two playtest reports with distinct bot_type values
